name: Aviation
copTitle: Personal Data Protection Code of Practice (Aviation) 2022

deltaFromBaseline: MFA for all reservation systems (DCS, GDS)
Annual security assessments for passenger data systems
CCTV 30-day maximum retention for general surveillance

sensitiveData.protectionLevel: Explicit consent except government-mandated immigration; DPIA before deployment
deltaFromBaseline: Biometric data requires explicit consent except government-mandated
DPIA mandatory before biometric system deployment
Government-mandated immigration biometrics exempt from consent
Dual reporting to Commissioner AND CAAM
Significant passenger data breaches require CAAM notification

crossBorder.transferScenarios: PNR/API transfers to foreign authorities; GDS partner data sharing
crossBorder.mechanisms: s129A documentation; adequacy or derogation for PNR/API; ICAO Annex 9 compliance
deltaFromBaseline: PNR/API transfers to foreign authorities require s129A documentation
ICAO Annex 9 compliance for international passenger data sharing
GDS partner sharing requires documented transfer agreements

provisions.title: Passenger Name Records (PNR)
provisions.summary: Mandatory sharing with immigration authorities under ICAO Annex 9

provisions.title: Biometric Data at Airports
provisions.summary: Explicit consent except government-mandated; DPIA before deployment

provisions.title: Frequent Flyer Programmes
provisions.summary: Alliance partner data sharing with documented agreements

provisions.title: CCTV and Surveillance
provisions.summary: Notices at all camera locations; general footage 30-day max retention
